Creation-Time.description: The date/time the blob was created.

Last-Modified.description: The date/time the blob was last modified.

Content-Length.description: The size of the blob in bytes.

Content-Type.description: The content type of the blob.

Content-Encoding.description: The content encoding of the blob.

Content-Language.description: The content language of the blob.

Content-MD5.description: The MD5 hash of the blob content.

Content-Disposition.description: The content disposition of the blob.

Cache-Control.description: The cache control of the blob.

AccessTier.description: The access tier of the blob.

AccessTierInferred.description: Whether the access tier was inferred.

ServerEncrypted.description: Whether the blob data and metadata are encrypted.
